name: article-evidence-search
description: Aplicacao local/PWA para busca rigorosa de artigos no PubMed com auditoria de PDF e extracao cientifica.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/core/extractors.mjs && node --check src/core/onlineTermResolver.mjs && node --check src/core/pdfResolver.mjs && node --check src/core/pipeline.mjs && node --check src/core/pubmedClient.mjs && node --check src/core/queryBuilder.mjs && node --check src/core/termResolver.mjs && node --check src/core/validation.mjs && node --check public/app.js
